opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I feel like I'm drowning every time I try to sleep, and I have to sit bolt upright just to catch a breath.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Rapidly worsening breathlessness over two days with inability to lie flat and severe leg swelling; nursing staff sought urgent advice.

symptom_narrative.onset: worsening exertional breathlessness over about two weeks, acutely much worse in the last two days
symptom_narrative.duration: two weeks of reduced exercise tolerance, then a sharp deterioration over 48 hours - now breathless at rest and unable to lie flat
symptom_narrative.character: a suffocating breathlessness, worst lying down, with heavy swollen legs
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: feels like drowning when lying down; has to sit bolt upright to breathe
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: breathing trouble in the chest; swelling in both legs, now up the thighs
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: much worse lying down and at night - woke last night gasping for air; needs three pillows
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: severe leg swelling up to the thighs and rapid weight gain; denies fever or productive cough
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: known heart failure managed with a water tablet, but this is an acute flare
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: bed-to-chair only, profoundly limited by breathlessness; high fall risk

past_medical_history.how_managed: usually takes a daily water tablet (furosemide)

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: usual daily dose, but not given for the last three days due to a facility prescription-refill error

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives in an aged-care facility with nursing staff support; profoundly limited mobility and high fall risk

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: frightened by the breathlessness; reliant on facility staff

communication_style.typical_message_style: breathless short answers; nursing staff relay observations and history

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: measured and relayed by facility nursing staff on a ward oximeter
